description: Style NoteGet ready to move in style in these really feminine Ballerina shoes from adidas. These dainty shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with tees and skirts or denims.Product DetailsBlunt toed ballerina shoe in purple with gold tape detail around itElasticated strap at the midfootCushioned footbed for all day comfortMidsole gives lightweight comfortNon marking outsole with multi-directional pattern for greater gripPivot point for easier side to side reflexesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
